calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PETITIONER HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is taken off calender pursuant to settlement agreement, and by agreement of parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
